properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You surrounded me with songs of praise You have brought me to this place Where Your love and grace Move within my life Now Your message is my light

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your love is beautiful Your love is beautiful It's the reason why I sing

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All around the world Let the praise begin All around the world Let the praise begin

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am planted here by the waters And I'm living for the King I have found my peace In the house of God This is where I'm meant to be
